hero.title: Avengers: Infinity War
hero.hook: Released April 27, 2018 — premiere week anniversary of the biggest Marvel event
hero.blurb: Thanos arrives and the MCU's greatest threat finally makes good on his promise of destruction. This is the Empire Strikes Back of superhero cinema—bold, massive, and absolutely unafraid to break your heart.

birthday.title: The Truman Show
birthday.blurb: Jim Carrey's most poignant performance anchors this philosophical masterpiece about reality and control. Weir crafts a film that's endlessly clever yet deeply humane.

gem.title: Kes
gem.blurb: Ken Loach's heartbreaking portrait of a working-class Yorkshire boy and his red kestrel is British neorealism at its finest. A small, quiet film that contains entire worlds of pain and beauty.

awful.title: Disaster Movie
awful.blurb: A catastrophe of a comedy that confuses random pop culture references with humor and mistakes loudness for wit. Even at 87 minutes, this feels like a hostage situation.
